name: Apple Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, cream together butter, brown sugar, granulated sugar, eggs, sour cream, mashed banana, and vanilla until well combined.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, baking soda, and cinnamon.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just combined.
5. Gently fold in the chopped apples and walnuts.
6. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan.
7. Bake for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
